title: Saudi Arabia warns drivers of up to SR900 fines for illegal car window tinting
summary_full: Saudi Arabia's traffic department is reminding drivers about window tinting rules. Fines of SR500 to SR900 apply for violations. Tinting is allowed but must meet specific transparency standards. The front windshield must remain clear, with exceptions for authorized upper strips. Authorities emphasize clear visibility for safety and security.
